My story

From fixing devices to solving business problems.

My career has always centered on people, trust, and practical solutions. Each role has strengthened the skills I now want to bring into banking and financial services.

Built through experience

I started in mobile-device repair, where I learned to diagnose problems, explain options clearly, and earn customer trust. Later, as an operations manager, I handled cash accountability, inventory, vendors, staff, and the daily pressure of running a customer-facing business.

Where I’m going next

I’m building toward a long-term career in banking and financial services while sharpening my technology and AI skills. My goal is to help customers make confident decisions and eventually build tools that make financial opportunities easier to understand and access.
